Description: Shelf-stable packaged goods, bulk snacks, candies, and baking supplies.
Large-scale liquids (water, juice, soda) and high-volume pantry staples like oil and grains.
Freshly baked goods, artisan breads, and bulk pastries (often found near the back of the warehouse).
Higher-end prepared foods, specialty cheeses, or seasonal food gift packs.
Non-food items including batteries, small appliances, and household hardware.
Heavy-duty hardware, power tools, automotive accessories, and outdoor maintenance equipment.
Bedding, towels, kitchen storage, and general indoor home decor.
Physical media including books, magazines, and occasionally seasonal software or entertainment media.
